title: quercus humilis f. brachycarpa
intro: Quercus humilis f. brachycarpa, also known as the dwarf oak, is a subspecies of the Quercus humilis tree, characterized by its smaller stature and distinctive fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus humilis f. brachycarpa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support various health conditions.
